title: SystemC-model for GigaSpaceWire Protocol Simulation
author: Olenev, Valentin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The paper describes implementation process of GigaSpaceWire protocol simulation System-C model. At current point there is no available or implemented simulation models of this protocol. Implementation of GigaSpaceWire model will offer the possibility of protocol testing and validation. After the model description the paper provides results of GigaSpaceWire protocol specification validation, obtained during protocol simulation.
steps_raw: The paper describes implementation process of GigaSpaceWire protocol simulation System-C model. At current point there is no available or implemented simulation models of this protocol. Implementation of GigaSpaceWire model will offer the possibility of protocol testing and validation. After the model description the paper provides results of GigaSpaceWire protocol specification validation, obtained during protocol simulation.
